docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY DN CONSTRUCTION LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAOHUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAOHUA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE - PLAINTIFF DN CONSTRUCTION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DIRK NIEDERLARK. DEFENDANT XIAHUA HUANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DN CONSTRUCTION LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DN CONSTRUCTION LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAOHUA $2,976.51 PRINCIPAL, $606.00 INTEREST, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,707.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
